This valuation marks a discount compared to its industry's average Forward P/E of 15.18.", "Meanwhile, GM's PEG ratio is currently 0.97. This metric is used similarly to the famous P/E ratio, but the PEG ratio also takes into account the stock's expected earnings growth rate.
